Blaze.description: Blaze increases the power of Fire-type moves by 50% (1.5×) when the ability-bearer's HP falls below a third of its maximum (known in-game as in a pinch).

Solar Power.description: During harsh sunlight, Solar Power raises the ability-bearer's Special Attack by 50%, but it also loses 1⁄8 of its maximum HP after each turn.

Tough Claws.description: Tough Claws increases the power of moves that make contact. Most Physical-category moves are contact moves.

Drought.description: Drought creates harsh sunlight when the ability-bearer enters battle. The effect lasts 5 turns, unless it is cleared via Air Lock or Cloud Nine or replaced by another weather condition.

G-Max Wildfire.description: G-Max Wildfire is a G-Max Move from Pokemon Sword and Shield, exclusive to Charizard. Fire type moves turn into G-Max Wildfire during Gigantamax.

Strong Jaw.description: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

Shell Armor.description: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

Swift Swim.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

Dancer.description: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

Guts.description: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.

Scrappy.description: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

Limber.description: The Pokémon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

Imposter.description: The Pokémon transforms itself into the Pokémon it's facing.

Vital Spirit.description: The Pokémon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from falling asleep.

Pickup.description: The Pokémon may pick up an item another Pokémon used during a battle. It may pick up items outside of battle, too.

Run Away.description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

Intimidate.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

Sand Rush.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in a sandstorm.

Fairy Aura.description: Powers up the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the field.

Frisk.description: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

Sap Sipper.description: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.

Toxic Debris.description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

Corrosion.description: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it's a Steel or Poison type.

Levitate.description: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

Sand Veil.description: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.

Shred Skin.description: The Pokémon may cure its own status conditions by shedding its skin.

Sand Stream.description: The Pokémon summons a sandstorm when it enters a battle.

Unnerve.description: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.
